hero.title: Welcome to Restaurant Rogoznica
hero.subtitle: Modern Dalmatian table with heart
hero.desc: Elevated meat classics, fresh fish and homemade prosciutto and cheese
hero.tagline: Open kitchen. Late-night vibe on weekends. Quieter lunches and dinners on weekdays.

why.title: Why here
why.text: Hidden on Zagreb's Sveti duh 38 street, Restaurant Rogoznica was created for people who care about food, atmosphere, company, the scent of the sea, and a good glass of wine. Come for lunch or dinner and stay for the grill, wine and Dalmatian atmosphere.

items.name: Octopus salad & smoked tuna
items.desc: Pag cheese drizzled with olive oil and honey

items.name: Veal under the peka
items.desc: Crispy polenta, pickled red onion, flavours of paradise

items.name: Cheesecake with smoked plum
items.desc: Subtle smoke, cherry glaze, walnut crumble

about.meta_desc: The story behind Restaurant Rogoznica — traditional Dalmatian cuisine built on fire, season and true hospitality.
about.hero_title: A restaurant built around fire, season and rhythm
about.hero_sub: Rogoznica combines tradition with a lighter, cleaner approach without losing its soul.
about.values_text: Our values are rooted in simple but firm principles that we live every day. We believe in local and seasonal — we work with small eco producers from the Zagreb area, source fish daily, directly from Dalmatia, and adapt the menu to the rhythm of nature and what is best at any given moment.
about.values_text2: We are guided solely by the idea of quality and guest satisfaction — through thoughtful preparation and a smaller menu, we aim to get the most out of every ingredient. Hospitality here has its own standard: a relaxed atmosphere does not mean a lack of attention, but quite the opposite — every detail has its place.
about.values_text3: Our team consists of chefs, waiters and bartenders who love the dynamics of the job, but equally know when to slow down and give guests their full attention.
about.val1_text: We work with small eco producers and source fish daily from Dalmatia.
about.val2_text: Smaller menu, maximum use of every ingredient, guest satisfaction above all.
about.val3_text: A relaxed atmosphere doesn't mean a lack of attention — every detail has its place.
about.team_text: Josipa & Vjeko run the kitchen and dining room calmly and precisely. The renowned Surprise Chef leads the kitchen with a focus on live fire, seasonal ingredients and Dalmatian flavours in both modern and traditional style.

events.how_text: Opposite the Church of St Anthony of Padua. Walk along Sveti Duh street to find the gem of Dalmatian flavours.
events.parking: Parking: limited on street; nearby parking available
events.access: Accessibility: entrance with steps, directly from the street
events.hosts_text: Josipa & Vjeko run the kitchen and dining room calmly and precisely. The Surprise Chef leads the kitchen with a focus on live fire, seasonal ingredients and Dalmatian flavours.
